```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-content text-center">
    <img src="assets/img/logo.svg" alt="EpiAware Logo" class="hero-logo hero-logo-light">
    <img src="assets/img/logo.svg" alt="EpiAware Logo" class="hero-logo hero-logo-dark">
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Composable tools for infectious disease modelling in Julia.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```
